commands.review_summary:
The PR adds WhatsApp live QA startup optimizations, Convex credential retry and role handling, runtime import narrowing, RTT diagnostics, agent/provider startup pruning, and workflow/check-script changes.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: PR-head source shows heap snapshots copied into the uploaded artifact directory and WhatsApp maintainer secret validation inserted into the Telegram job. The successful live RTT target itself is not reproduced because the PR body says credential pool state blocks it.
